keyword_description: This weapon can be used to make attacks even if the bearer Advanced this turn.
If the target unit has 6 or more models, this weapon makes a minimum of 3 attacks. If the target unit has 11 or more models, it makes a minimum of 6 attacks.
If a Critical Wound is scored, the target suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack, and the attack sequence ends.
Make attacks with this weapon in addition to attacks with the model's other melee weapons.
After the model makes attacks with this weapon, roll one D6. On a 1, the bearer suffers 1 mortal wound.
The target of this weapon cannot use the Benefit of Cover against attacks made with this weapon.
This weapon can target units that are not visible to the attacking model.
If the bearer made a Charge move this turn, add 1 to this weapon's Strength characteristic for that fight.
Critical Hits automatically wound the target.
This weapon can be used to make attacks in the Fight phase.
Attacks made with this weapon can target a Character model in an enemy unit even if that Character is not the closest model.
This weapon is a Psychic weapon.
This weapon automatically hits its target.
